name: [WIP] Projected Shadow Removal
author: automata-rtx
description: Removes Twilight Princess's fake projected ground shadows - the slowly swaying dappled shadows under forest canopies and the rolling cloud shadows across Hyrule Field, both drawn by the game's 'moya' system as a scrolling texture cast onto the ground. Turning them off lets realtime shadow/GI mods provide the shading instead. The Death Mountain-style heat shimmer, which shares the same draw, is preserved. EXPERIMENTAL
